user_query: I'm a travel blogger and I want to write an article about the best hiking trails in Colorado. Can you provide me with a list of postcodes within a radius of 20 kilometers from each trailhead? Additionally, give me the latitude and longitude coordinates for each trailhead.

TaskList.description: Gather a list of the best hiking trails in Colorado along with their trailhead locations.
For each trailhead obtained from Step 1, retrieve the latitude and longitude coordinates.
For each trailhead, find and list postcodes within a 20-kilometer radius.
